title: Gently Roasted Syrian Chicken Kebabs
description: A light and flavorful Syrian dish featuring chicken, flaked almonds, and a blend of spices, perfect for a kid-friendly meal. This recipe is ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly and easy to make.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, paprika, salt, black pepper, and cumin.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Sprinkle the flaked almonds over the chicken pieces.
Place the skewers on a broiler pan lined with aluminum foil and broil for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Flip the skewers halfway through the cooking time to ensure even cooking.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the chicken kebabs hot, garnished with additional flaked almonds if desired.
